description: A checked-in upstream-style protobuf conformance subset imported into Moon Proto Lab's oracle-backed fixture matrix. The cases model protobuf conformance runner input/output semantics while staying small enough for contest CI.
source_note: Modeled after protobuf conformance concepts: protobuf binary input, JSON output, unknown-field skipping, duplicate singular last-one-wins, packed/unpacked repeated numeric input, maps, oneof, boundary numerics and special float JSON strings.

cases.name: Required.Proto3.ScalarRepeatedPacked.BinaryInput
cases.feature: proto3 scalar, bytes, repeated string and packed numeric fields accepted from protobuf input

cases.name: Required.Proto3.JsonInt64BytesEscaping.JsonOutput
cases.feature: protobuf JSON 64-bit integers are strings and bytes are base64 while string escaping is preserved

cases.name: Required.Proto3.UnknownFieldsAreSkipped.BinaryInput
cases.feature: unknown binary field 99 is skipped and does not appear in JSON output
cases.upstream_reference: Binary parser accepts unknown fields and drops them for JSON output

cases.name: Required.Proto3.DuplicateSingularLastOneWins.BinaryInput
cases.feature: duplicate singular uint64 field keeps the final decoded value
cases.upstream_reference: Last value wins for duplicate singular non-message fields

cases.name: Required.Proto3.PackedAndUnpackedRepeatedAccepted.BinaryInput
cases.feature: repeated numeric field accepts both unpacked occurrences and packed payload in one stream
cases.upstream_reference: Repeated primitive numeric fields accept packed and unpacked encodings

cases.name: Required.Proto3.MapStringUInt64.JsonOutput
cases.feature: map<string,uint64> renders as a JSON object with uint64 string values
cases.upstream_reference: Proto3 JSON map field object mapping

cases.name: Required.Proto3.MapInt64Keys.JsonOutput
cases.feature: map<int64,string> renders integer keys as JSON object string properties
cases.upstream_reference: Proto3 JSON map keys are strings

cases.name: Required.Proto3.OneofSelectedField.JsonOutput
cases.feature: oneof emits only the selected field in JSON output
cases.upstream_reference: Oneof JSON mapping selected field semantics

cases.name: Required.Proto3.Numeric32Boundaries.JsonOutput
cases.feature: uint32/int32/sint32/fixed32/sfixed32 boundary values preserve protobuf JSON numeric forms

cases.name: Required.Proto3.FloatDouble.JsonOutput
cases.feature: finite float and double values preserve JSON numeric output

cases.name: Required.Proto3.SpecialFloatJsonStrings.JsonOutput
cases.feature: NaN, Infinity and -Infinity render as protobuf JSON strings
